TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == sibaniay nu balunga śį£ŚĘäŤąĻ == sibaniay nu balunga "Ingu : Hovercraft/Air cushion vehicle" u sakaybali a balungaan nu isasaay a saculil, ina sibaniay u caayay kaputun a pabalian tu nu bali. sibaniay a balungaan u makaydaay i nanuman, taneng henay makayda i masaenalay nu dadanan atu i sulesuledaan a muculil. ina sibaniay nu balungaan u sediw sananay a muculil, muculil sa u udip nu balungan mapabali sisa i pabaw nu nanum, mawada nu sakay udipan nu sapipuut nu bali, sisa amilik ku culil mikaka tu hucunu balungaan ku amilik. hatiniay tu nu sibaniay nu balungaan u amilik milakuuyt tu 50 a batacan, nika atu duma nu amelikay a balungaan caay kalecad, u mahiniay sibaniay nu balungaan a nikatapabawan caay kaw u amelik ku han, sisa kanahatu mahaymaw ku culil, caay pikawaw tu kapah nida. sibaniay nu balungaan malatusa cacay u "mamin sibaniay" atu "tapiingan ku sibaniay". mamin sibaniay "Hovercraft" u liklik tabuen namin tu suka mahakama, pacumudeng nu pabaliay nu kikayan patayda i sasa malasibaniay, pacumud sayadahay u sikulupilaay atu mipesay a sapabali. mamin sibaniay nu balungaan u culil nida makaala tu pitu a bataan nu batac, malatusa ku culil cacay han i nanuman cacay sa sikay dadan. mahiniay nu sibaniay a balungaan sakay hitay maaymas, taneng i tida i lalaliwan nu nanum utiihay a papacunaay a tayda. (Hovercraft) . "tapiingan" nu sibaniay a balungaan, saan tu hekal nu balunga "Surface Effect Ships, SES", i sasa nu tapiingan nu balunga idaw ku nipa'cek i nanum, itida sa i nu ayawan atu nikudan nu mamuniay a nisahakamaan. pacumud satu hidan nu laylay nu nanum sikulupila atu sapipesan nu kikay. atu masasetset tu hamin nu sibaniay, tapiingan nanay nu sibaniay a balungaan ku tabakiay ku icelang, nipilawpesan adidi, maaymas atu tabakiay nu balungaan, nika la'cu sapakay dadan atu nanuman. ina Su-len kaygung namisanga tu tapingan nanay nu sibaniay a balungaan ba'ket makaala tu walu a lasubuan ku ba'ket, lima a bataan ku batac a sapidiputaw nu balungaan. 105 318 "ŚĀīŚ£ĀŚľŹ"śį£ŚĘäŤąĻ, . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ sumamad i cudaday ni kilukan tu sibaniay nu balungaan a nipisikian namaka Zue-ten sitangahay a tademaw ci Se-wi-deng-paw itida i caypiccaynem mihcaan a patahekal, nisikian nida u tademaw ku pacumuday tu balian. tawya inai' ku tatengaay a nipisanga, matineng naim ku tademaw nai' ku laheci a misanga ku tademaw tu munabaway nu cikalaan. . caywalpicsep mihcaan tu teban, Ing-kuo sitangahay a tademaw ci Cung.Ay-sa-ke'. Suo-e-ni-ke'-la-hu-ta' cise nasipakayni i tisiaw-yenli nipisanga tu pina nu micapiay tu sibaniay a kakuan, mipanganga , nika caay pitaneng. 1870ŚĻīšĽ£šł≠, . Huen-lan sitangahay a tademaw ci Tuo-yi-wuo. Yu-ha-ni. Ka-li-o u kuo-li hikuki nu misangaay tu inzin nu hikukian a sakakaay, itida i caysiwlucay mihcaan malingatu misiki tu sibaniay nu balungaan. misangan ci nida atu mitanam sakay "Pintaliit√§j√§ N:o 1" imihan " inanuman u tabesiw sananay mubahel saka cacay" a sakay nanum nu mibahelay nu kikayan, maala nida ku sakasingangan itida i Hun-lan 18630 ku banggu atu 26122 baguan. ci Ka-li-o amica kunika misiki atu misanga tu sayaway nu sibaniay a balungaan, nikamasangaay nida caay ka taneng ku kalisiw sisa caay aca ka kapah ku nikalahatan. "Pintaliit√§j√§ N:o 1" . aydaay nu sibaniay a balungaan itida i caysiwlimlu mihcaan u Ing-kuo ci Ke'-li-se-duo-fu. Kuo-ke-zue-e ku misangaay. u sapihelup tu tatuniay a muota sapisanga nida tu sibaniay nu balungaan a kakuan, malingatu mikinkiw. caysiwlimsep mihcaan, Ing-kuo miasipay tu sulitan a misiwbayay yadah tu ku nipisangan nuheni tu sibaniay nu balungaan, sipitupin nuheni tu milakuwitay tu bayuan a kakacawan. nikuda satu matekes ku simal, Ing-lun bayu a sibaniay nu balungaan hamaw satu males. SR-N1, . ing-yun śáČÁĒ® sibaniay nu balunga satayda i enalan nu balungaanśį£ŚĘäÁôĽťôłŤČá masakaputay nu cun-se-haw malatusaay misidepay nu balungaan LCAC itida i Cia-cuo-pan-de-tun kaygung nu dadipasan malingatu minanam. LCAC . sibaniay nu balungaan tu sakaydada atu nanuman nu sapitupin tu sakalepacaw a kadideng amica u binacadan nu sibaniay a balungaan haymaw sa a malewpes, nika sibaniay nu balungaan manamuh ku hitay micukaymas. hamin nu tatengtengan nu sibaniay a balungaan kapah i likelikenan, lanulanuan, sasawacan, mamuniay nu likenan, sulesuledaan a kitidaan mutayda, anu namilakuwit tu masahicahicaay nu tuudan atu nanum, lalay nu lacuna. mahiniay sibaniay nu balungaan taneng miemek tu pitu a bataan a pasintu katukuh tu walu a bataan a pasintu nu dadipasan nu bayuan, micukaymas tu palaliwan nanay nu nanuman a balunga hakiya makaala tu sabaw lima a pasintu nu dadipasan a mutayda. itida i caysiwwalsep mihcaan malingatu misanga ku Amilika tu walu a bataan ‚Äď siwa a bataan nu balungaan LCAC "Landing Craft, Air-Cushioned sibaniay mutapabaw nu balungaan", papicukaymas tu kaygung atu micidekay nu hitayan. 123 80-90ŤČėLCAC(Landing Craft, Air-Cushioned, . LCAC nipitupin tu ba'ket makaala tu enem a bataan tun, anu cacaysa ku nipitupin tu cacay a lasubu walu a bataan a tademaw nu nimucuay a hitay, micapi tu sepat a bataan nu hitay atu sabaw tusa nu HMMWV a kadidengan, hatkiya tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat nu hitayan atu cacay nu M1 ay-pu-lan-tan-ke' nu kadidengan. anu matumes ku nipitupin tu canancanan u kalamkam makaala tu sepat a batacan, nipakabesbsesan tu la'ad makaala tu tulu a lasubuan nu ing-li, taneng milakuuyt tu milawaay tu sepat a cean nu milawaay a tuudan, nika sakatalawan sa ku nipikan tu simal, nu cacayay a tatukian makaala tu cacay a malebut nu ciaw-lun ku sapasimal. caay kaedem ku culil nu sakatabatad nu dadan, LCAC malacad atu adidiay nu mitukuhay i dadipasan nanay nu balungaan, idaw ku tusaay a mipapadaicawan nu balunga atu cun-u-den-lu balungaan a mitupin, uyni u LCAC kanahatu ina mitusaay nu sakalepacaw a babalungaan anu caay henay picumud i nanum, taneg a lihalay sa mamincumud, kababelih han, adidiay nu balungaan amihalhal aca tu nipacumud tu nanum kiya taneng micumud. LCACŤľČťáć60Śôł, 12ŤľõHMMWV M1 ,LCAC ,ŤÄĆLCAC . LCAC sibaniay nu balungaan nai' ku nipacumud tu sapidiputaw tu cun-cia-hun-hu', sapihaka atu kulupila i hekal namin, anu pihaceng ku nikalepacawan hinapeci'. Nitupinan tu tuud aca itida namin i hekal ku nipadeng, anu la'cus ku demiad utiih a kapahen ku nipidiput. sisa, tadatabakitu ku suni atu nipihelupan tu anabuh u sakala'cus nu balungaan ku mahiniaay sa, kanahatu idaw ku bulang sapipuut, taneng pakakapah ku nipacunaan nu pacunaay a tademaw, nika tadala'cus tu ku demiad saculil nu balunga u wenday namin. LCAC .
S.PHON: == sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča *** == sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča "iŇču : ńßo*…ôr ¶raft/air ¶usńßion *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" u sakajbar~…ĺi a bar~…ĺuŇčaan nu isasaaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ina sibaniaj u ¶aajaj kaputun a pabar~…ĺian tu nu bar~…ĺi. sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u makajdaaj i nanuman, tan…ôŇč ńß…ônaj makajda i masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu dadanan atu i sur~…ĺ…ôsur~…ĺ…ôdaan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ina sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u s…ôdiw sananaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sa u udip nu bar~…ĺuŇčan mapabar~…ĺi sisa i pabaw nu nanum, mawada nu sakaj udipan nu sapipuut nu bar~…ĺi, sisa amir~…ĺik ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ mikaka tu ńßu ¶unu bar~…ĺuŇčaan ku amir~…ĺik. ńßatiniaj tu nu sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u amir~…ĺik mir~…ĺakuujt tu ** a bata ¶an, nika atu duma nu am…ôr~…ĺikaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u mańßiniaj sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a nikatapabawan ¶aaj kaw u am…ôr~…ĺik ku ńßan, sisa kanańßatu mańßajmaw ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶aaj pikawaw tu kapańß nida. sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan mar~…ĺatusa ¶a ¶aj u "mamin sibaniaj" atu "tapiiŇčan ku sibaniaj". mamin sibaniaj "ńßo*…ôr ¶raft" u r~…ĺikr~…ĺik tabu…ôn namin tu suka mańßakama, pa ¶umud…ôŇč nu pabar~…ĺiaj nu kikajan patajda i sasa mar~…ĺasibaniaj, pa ¶umud sajadańßaj u sikur~…ĺupir~…ĺaaj atu mip…ôsaj a sapabar~…ĺi. mamin sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nida makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a bataan nu bata ¶, mar~…ĺatusa ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj ńßan i nanuman ¶a ¶aj sa sikaj dadan. mańßiniaj nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan sakaj ńßitaj maajmas, tan…ôŇč i tida i r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan nu nanum utiińßaj a papa ¶unaaj a tajda. (ńßo*…ôr ¶raft) . "tapiiŇčan" nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, saan tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča "surfa ¶…ô …ôff…ô ¶t sńßips, s…ôs", i sasa nu tapiiŇčan nu bar~…ĺuŇča idaw ku nipa Ē~ ° ¶…ôk i nanum, itida sa i nu ajawan atu nikudan nu mamuniaj a nisańßakamaan. pa ¶umud satu ńßidan nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu nanum sikur~…ĺupir~…ĺa atu sapip…ôsan nu kikaj. atu masas…ôts…ôt tu ńßamin nu sibaniaj, tapiiŇčan nanaj nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ku tabakiaj ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, nipir~…ĺawp…ôsan adidi, maajmas atu tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, nika r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶u sapakaj dadan atu nanuman. ina su-r~…ĺ…ôn kajguŇč namisaŇča tu tapiŇčan nanaj nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ba Ē~ °k…ôt makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubuan ku ba Ē~ °k…ôt, r~…ĺima a bataan ku bata ¶ a sapidiputaw nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. *** *** "***"***, . r~…ĺikisi ** sumamad i ¶udadaj ni kir~…ĺukan tu sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a nipisikian namaka zu…ô-t…ôn sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw ¶i s…ô-wi-d…ôŇč-paw itida i ¶ajpi ¶ ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, nisikian nida u tad…ômaw ku pa mar~…ĺ…ôwp…ôs, nika sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan manamuńß ku ńßitaj mi ¶ukajmas. ńßamin nu tat…ôŇčt…ôŇčan nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan kapańß i r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan, r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan, sasawa ¶an, mamuniaj nu r~…ĺik…ônan, sur~…ĺ…ôsur~…ĺ…ôdaan a kitidaan mutajda, anu namir~…ĺakuwit tu masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu tuudan atu nanum, r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶una. mańßiniaj sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan tan…ôŇč mi…ôm…ôk tu bataan tun, anu ¶a ¶ajsa ku nipitupin tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan a tad…ômaw nu nimu ¶uaj a ńßitaj, mi ¶api tu s…ôpat a bataan nu ńßitaj atu sabaw tusa nu ńßmmw* a kadid…ôŇčan, ńßatkija tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat nu ńßitajan atu ¶a ¶aj nu m* aj-pu-r~…ĺan-tan-k…ô Ē~ ° nu kadid…ôŇčan. anu matum…ôs ku nipitupin tu ¶anan ¶anan u kar~…ĺamkam makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a bata ¶an, nipakab…ôsbs…ôsan tu r~…ĺa Ē~ °ad makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubuan nu iŇč-r~…ĺi, tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺakuujt tu mir~…ĺawaaj tu s…ôpat a ¶…ôan nu mir~…ĺawaaj a tuudan, nika sakatar~…ĺawan sa ku nipikan tu simar~…ĺ, nu ¶a ¶ajaj a tatukian makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu ¶iaw-r~…ĺun ku sapasimar~…ĺ. ¶aaj ka…ôd…ôm ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sakatabatad nu dadan, r~…ĺ ¶a ¶ mar~…ĺa ¶ad atu adidiaj nu mitukuńßaj i dadipasan nanaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, idaw ku tusaaj a mipapadai ¶awan nu bar~…ĺuŇča atu ¶un-u-d…ôn-r~…ĺu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a mitupin, ujni u r~…ĺ ¶a ¶ kanańßatu ina mitusaaj nu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw a babar~…ĺuŇčaan anu ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pi ¶umud i nanum, tan…ôg a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sa mamin ¶umud, kabab…ôr~…ĺińß ńßan, adidiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan amińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ a ¶a tu nipa ¶umud tu nanum kija tan…ôŇč mi ¶umud. r~…ĺ ¶a ¶*****, ***ńßmmw* m* ,r~…ĺ ¶a ¶ ,*r~…ĺ ¶a ¶ . r~…ĺ ¶a ¶ sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan nai Ē~ ° ku nipa ¶umud tu sapidiputaw tu ¶un- ¶ia-ńßun-ńßu Ē~ °, sapińßaka atu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ namin, anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan ńßinap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. nitupinan tu tuud a ¶a itida namin i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ku nipad…ôŇč, anu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku d…ômiad utiińß a kapańß…ôn ku nipidiput. sisa, tadatabakitu ku suni atu nipińß…ôr~…ĺupan tu anabuńß u sakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan ku mańßiniaaj sa, kanańßatu idaw ku bur~…ĺaŇč sapipuut, tan…ôŇč pakakapańß ku nipa ¶unaan nu pa ¶unaaj a tad…ômaw, nika tadar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu ku d…ômiad sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča u w…ôndaj namin. r~…ĺ ¶a ¶ .
S.FORM: == sibaniay nu balunga śį£ŚĘäŤąĻ == sibaniay nu balunga "Ingu : Hovercraft/Air cushion vehicle" u sakaybali a balungaan nu isasaay a saculil, ina sibaniay u caayay kaputun a pabalian tu nu bali. sibaniay a balungaan u makaydaay i nanuman, taneng henay makayda i masaenalay nu dadanan atu i sulesuledaan a muculil. ina sibaniay nu balungaan u sediw sananay a muculil, muculil sa u udip nu balungan mapabali sisa i pabaw nu nanum, mawada nu sakay udipan nu sapipuut nu bali, sisa amilik ku culil mikaka tu hucunu balungaan ku amilik. hatiniay tu nu sibaniay nu balungaan u amilik milakuuyt tu 50 a batacan, nika atu duma nu amelikay a balungaan caay kalecad, u mahiniay sibaniay nu balungaan a nikatapabawan caay kaw u amelik ku han, sisa kanahatu mahaymaw ku culil, caay pikawaw tu kapah nida. sibaniay nu balungaan malatusa cacay u "mamin sibaniay" atu "tapiingan ku sibaniay". mamin sibaniay "Hovercraft" u liklik tabuen namin tu suka mahakama, pacumudeng nu pabaliay nu kikayan patayda i sasa malasibaniay, pacumud sayadahay u sikulupilaay atu mipesay a sapabali. mamin sibaniay nu balungaan u culil nida makaala tu pitu a bataan nu batac, malatusa ku culil cacay han i nanuman cacay sa sikay dadan. mahiniay nu sibaniay a balungaan sakay hitay maaymas, taneng i tida i lalaliwan nu nanum utiihay a papacunaay a tayda. (Hovercraft) . "tapiingan" nu sibaniay a balungaan, saan tu hekal nu balunga "Surface Effect Ships, SES", i sasa nu tapiingan nu balunga idaw ku nipa'cek i nanum, itida sa i nu ayawan atu nikudan nu mamuniay a nisahakamaan. pacumud satu hidan nu laylay nu nanum sikulupila atu sapipesan nu kikay. atu masasetset tu hamin nu sibaniay, tapiingan nanay nu sibaniay a balungaan ku tabakiay ku icelang, nipilawpesan adidi, maaymas atu tabakiay nu balungaan, nika la'cu sapakay dadan atu nanuman. ina Su-len kaygung namisanga tu tapingan nanay nu sibaniay a balungaan ba'ket makaala tu walu a lasubuan ku ba'ket, lima a bataan ku batac a sapidiputaw nu balungaan. 105 318 "ŚĀīŚ£ĀŚľŹ"śį£ŚĘäŤąĻ, . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ sumamad i cudaday ni kilukan tu sibaniay nu balungaan a nipisikian namaka Zue-ten sitangahay a tademaw ci Se-wi-deng-paw itida i caypiccaynem mihcaan a patahekal, nisikian nida u tademaw ku pacumuday tu balian. tawya inai' ku tatengaay a nipisanga, matineng naim ku tademaw nai' ku laheci a misanga ku tademaw tu munabaway nu cikalaan. . caywalpicsep mihcaan tu teban, Ing-kuo sitangahay a tademaw ci Cung.Ay-sa-ke'. Suo-e-ni-ke'-la-hu-ta' cise nasipakayni i tisiaw-yenli nipisanga tu pina nu micapiay tu sibaniay a kakuan, mipanganga , nika caay pitaneng. 1870ŚĻīšĽ£šł≠, . Huen-lan sitangahay a tademaw ci Tuo-yi-wuo. Yu-ha-ni. Ka-li-o u kuo-li hikuki nu misangaay tu inzin nu hikukian a sakakaay, itida i caysiwlucay mihcaan malingatu misiki tu sibaniay nu balungaan. misangan ci nida atu mitanam sakay "Pintaliit√§j√§ N:o 1" imihan " inanuman u tabesiw sananay mubahel saka cacay" a sakay nanum nu mibahelay nu kikayan, maala nida ku sakasingangan itida i Hun-lan 18630 ku banggu atu 26122 baguan. ci Ka-li-o amica kunika misiki atu misanga tu sayaway nu sibaniay a balungaan, nikamasangaay nida caay ka taneng ku kalisiw sisa caay aca ka kapah ku nikalahatan. "Pintaliit√§j√§ N:o 1" . aydaay nu sibaniay a balungaan itida i caysiwlimlu mihcaan u Ing-kuo ci Ke'-li-se-duo-fu. Kuo-ke-zue-e ku misangaay. u sapihelup tu tatuniay a muota sapisanga nida tu sibaniay nu balungaan a kakuan, malingatu mikinkiw. caysiwlimsep mihcaan, Ing-kuo miasipay tu sulitan a misiwbayay yadah tu ku nipisangan nuheni tu sibaniay nu balungaan, sipitupin nuheni tu milakuwitay tu bayuan a kakacawan. nikuda satu matekes ku simal, Ing-lun bayu a sibaniay nu balungaan hamaw satu males. SR-N1, . ing-yun śáČÁĒ® sibaniay nu balunga satayda i enalan nu balungaanśį£ŚĘäÁôĽťôłŤČá masakaputay nu cun-se-haw malatusaay misidepay nu balungaan LCAC itida i Cia-cuo-pan-de-tun kaygung nu dadipasan malingatu minanam. LCAC . sibaniay nu balungaan tu sakaydada atu nanuman nu sapitupin tu sakalepacaw a kadideng amica u binacadan nu sibaniay a balungaan haymaw sa a malewpes, nika sibaniay nu balungaan manamuh ku hitay micukaymas. hamin nu tatengtengan nu sibaniay a balungaan kapah i likelikenan, lanulanuan, sasawacan, mamuniay nu likenan, sulesuledaan a kitidaan mutayda, anu namilakuwit tu masahicahicaay nu tuudan atu nanum, lalay nu lacuna. mahiniay sibaniay nu balungaan taneng miemek tu pitu a bataan a pasintu katukuh tu walu a bataan a pasintu nu dadipasan nu bayuan, micukaymas tu palaliwan nanay nu nanuman a balunga hakiya makaala tu sabaw lima a pasintu nu dadipasan a mutayda. itida i caysiwwalsep mihcaan malingatu misanga ku Amilika tu walu a bataan ‚Äď siwa a bataan nu balungaan LCAC "Landing Craft, Air-Cushioned sibaniay mutapabaw nu balungaan", papicukaymas tu kaygung atu micidekay nu hitayan. 123 80-90ŤČėLCAC(Landing Craft, Air-Cushioned, . LCAC nipitupin tu ba'ket makaala tu enem a bataan tun, anu cacaysa ku nipitupin tu cacay a lasubu walu a bataan a tademaw nu nimucuay a hitay, micapi tu sepat a bataan nu hitay atu sabaw tusa nu HMMWV a kadidengan, hatkiya tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat nu hitayan atu cacay nu M1 ay-pu-lan-tan-ke' nu kadidengan. anu matumes ku nipitupin tu canancanan u kalamkam makaala tu sepat a batacan, nipakabesbsesan tu la'ad makaala tu tulu a lasubuan nu ing-li, taneng milakuuyt tu milawaay tu sepat a cean nu milawaay a tuudan, nika sakatalawan sa ku nipikan tu simal, nu cacayay a tatukian makaala tu cacay a malebut nu ciaw-lun ku sapasimal. caay kaedem ku culil nu sakatabatad nu dadan, LCAC malacad atu adidiay nu mitukuhay i dadipasan nanay nu balungaan, idaw ku tusaay a mipapadaicawan nu balunga atu cun-u-den-lu balungaan a mitupin, uyni u LCAC kanahatu ina mitusaay nu sakalepacaw a babalungaan anu caay henay picumud i nanum, taneg a lihalay sa mamincumud, kababelih han, adidiay nu balungaan amihalhal aca tu nipacumud tu nanum kiya taneng micumud. LCACŤľČťáć60Śôł, 12ŤľõHMMWV M1 ,LCAC ,ŤÄĆLCAC . LCAC sibaniay nu balungaan nai' ku nipacumud tu sapidiputaw tu cun-cia-hun-hu', sapihaka atu kulupila i hekal namin, anu pihaceng ku nikalepacawan hinapeci'. Nitupinan tu tuud aca itida namin i hekal ku nipadeng, anu la'cus ku demiad utiih a kapahen ku nipidiput. sisa, tadatabakitu ku suni atu nipihelupan tu anabuh u sakala'cus nu balungaan ku mahiniaay sa, kanahatu idaw ku bulang sapipuut, taneng pakakapah ku nipacunaan nu pacunaay a tademaw, nika tadala'cus tu ku demiad saculil nu balunga u wenday namin. LCAC .
S.PHON: == sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča *** == sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča "iŇču : ńßo*…ôr ¶raft/air ¶usńßion *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" u sakajbar~…ĺi a bar~…ĺuŇčaan nu isasaaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ina sibaniaj u ¶aajaj kaputun a pabar~…ĺian tu nu bar~…ĺi. sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u makajdaaj i nanuman, tan…ôŇč ńß…ônaj makajda i masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu dadanan atu i sur~…ĺ…ôsur~…ĺ…ôdaan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ina sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u s…ôdiw sananaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sa u udip nu bar~…ĺuŇčan mapabar~…ĺi sisa i pabaw nu nanum, mawada nu sakaj udipan nu sapipuut nu bar~…ĺi, sisa amir~…ĺik ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ mikaka tu ńßu ¶unu bar~…ĺuŇčaan ku amir~…ĺik. ńßatiniaj tu nu sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u amir~…ĺik mir~…ĺakuujt tu ** a bata ¶an, nika atu duma nu am…ôr~…ĺikaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u mańßiniaj sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a nikatapabawan ¶aaj kaw u am…ôr~…ĺik ku ńßan, sisa kanańßatu mańßajmaw ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶aaj pikawaw tu kapańß nida. sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan mar~…ĺatusa ¶a ¶aj u "mamin sibaniaj" atu "tapiiŇčan ku sibaniaj". mamin sibaniaj "ńßo*…ôr ¶raft" u r~…ĺikr~…ĺik tabu…ôn namin tu suka mańßakama, pa ¶umud…ôŇč nu pabar~…ĺiaj nu kikajan patajda i sasa mar~…ĺasibaniaj, pa ¶umud sajadańßaj u sikur~…ĺupir~…ĺaaj atu mip…ôsaj a sapabar~…ĺi. mamin sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nida makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a bataan nu bata ¶, mar~…ĺatusa ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj ńßan i nanuman ¶a ¶aj sa sikaj dadan. mańßiniaj nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan sakaj ńßitaj maajmas, tan…ôŇč i tida i r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan nu nanum utiińßaj a papa ¶unaaj a tajda. (ńßo*…ôr ¶raft) . "tapiiŇčan" nu sibaniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, saan tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča "surfa ¶…ô …ôff…ô ¶t sńßips, s…ôs", i sasa nu tapiiŇčan nu bar~…ĺuŇča idaw ku nipa Ē~ ° ¶…ôk i nanum, itida sa i nu ajawan atu nikudan nu mamuniaj a nisańßakamaan. pa ¶umud satu ńßidan nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu nanum sikur~…ĺupir~…ĺa atu sapip…ôsan nu kikaj. atu masas…ôts…ôt tu ńßamin nu sibaniaj, tapiiŇčan nanaj nu sibaniaj a
